title: Chunk Loaded Withers
description: Server-side mod that chunk loads withers with a customizable radius
body:
This server-side mod, made for Minecraft 1.20.1, keeps chunks loaded around Withers at all times, so they stay active even when you’re miles away or the server’s empty. This is mod is intended to be used alongside Reincarnated Wither for a more destructive experience

You can set the radius (default: 5 chunks) and choose whether to keep chunks loaded when no players are online (default: false) in config/chunkloadedwithers-common.toml.

Feel free to include this mod in any modpack.
